flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Kent State University at Kent fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (62.3% → 49.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Kent State University at Kent rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.9k → $13.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Kent State University at Kent rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.8k → $23.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kent State University at Kent fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
